email_subject: Application for Warehouse Operator Nightshift - Baver Ok
email_body:
Dear ASAP.be team,

I am writing to apply for the Warehouse Operator Nightshift position at your client in Nazareth, as advertised on VDAB. With my recent experience at Katoen Natie in a high-volume logistics environment, I am accustomed to maintaining accuracy and efficiency in fast-paced settings. I am reliable, physically fit, and comfortable working night shifts (00:00-08:00). I have my own transport and am available to start on 6 July 2026.

I am eager to contribute to a structured, temperature-controlled logistics operation and take pride in performing tasks such as loading/unloading, storing goods, and monitoring temperatures with care. I am a quick learner and committed to safety and hygiene standards.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss my application further. Thank you for your consideration.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to apply for the Warehouse Operator Nightshift position at your client in Nazareth, as advertised by ASAP.be. With a strong work ethic and recent hands-on experience in logistics at Katoen Natie, I am well-prepared to contribute to the smooth flow of chilled goods in a temperature-controlled environment.

At Katoen Natie, I maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics setting. This role taught me the importance of precision in loading/unloading, proper storage, and adherence to safety and hygiene protocols. I am comfortable working in cooler conditions (4-5°C) and am fully available for the fixed night shift from midnight to 8 a.m. I have my own reliable transport, ensuring punctuality.

I am a motivated individual who values order and cleanliness. I understand the critical nature of monitoring temperature levels and reporting any deviations. My ability to follow strict procedures and work independently during night hours makes me a strong fit for this role.

I am eager to bring my reliability and physical stamina to your team and contribute to a stable logistics operation. I would appreciate the opportunity to discuss how my background aligns with your needs.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to hearing from you.

Sincerely,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
Warehouse & Logistics experience at Katoen Natie (2025-2026) in a high-volume, fast-paced environment
Own transport available; punctual and reliable
Comfortable with night shifts and physical work
Strong attention to accuracy, safety, and hygiene
Quick learner, adaptable, and committed to following procedures
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Reliable and physically fit warehouse operator with hands-on experience in high-volume logistics at Katoen Natie. Accustomed to maintaining accuracy and efficiency in fast-paced environments, with a strong focus on safety and hygiene. Comfortable working night shifts and in temperature-controlled conditions. Own transport available. Quick learner, motivated to contribute to a structured logistics operation.

CORE SKILLS
- Loading and unloading trucks
- Goods storage and internal transport
- Temperature monitoring and deviation reporting
- Maintaining work post cleanliness and order
- Accuracy and efficiency in high-volume settings
- Safety and hygiene compliance
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)

EXPERIENCE

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
